content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-positioned on the track.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 21 + 5 = 26
Waypoint 26: (6.898461, 0.926227)
Car position: (6.147540, 0.656960)
Bearing = atan2(0.926227 - 0.656960, 6.898461 - 6.147540) = atan2(0.269267, 0.750921) = atan2(0.3586) ≈ 19.74°
Current heading: 0.120°
Delta = 19.74 - 0.120 = 19.62° → moderate left needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead as shown in image; delta to waypoint 26 is +19.62° (left), so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large right-hand curve (from driver's perspective, heading increases = left in math) begins around waypoint 24-30",
    "Car is nearly centered on the straight, delta increases as curve approaches",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-20° entering curve",
    "After the right curve, track loops back left and returns — full circuit",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves",
    "Waypoints 0-23 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",
    "Right curve starts gently at wp24 (y increases), sharpens at wp27-30",
    "Car heading stays near 0° on the straight — minimal correction needed on straight",
    "Delta ~19° at wp26 confirms entering the right curve — need moderate left steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.8525, 5.9498, 6.0516, 6.1475],
    "y": [0.6516, 0.6512, 0.6526, 0.6570],
    "yaw": [-1.263, -1.060, -0.641, 0.120]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 19.62,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
